subcodes.first_line: O Thou Whom I invoke in the depths of night, Who art the Confidant of him who doth commune, and unto Whom I turn in fervent prayer in solitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اناجیه فی جنح اللیالی و هو المناجی للناجی و ابتهلت الیه فی خلوات
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for protection
